Our Story

Rooted in passion,
grown with care

Seven Flowers was born from a deep reverence for the natural world. We believe every garden tells a story — of seasons, of memory, of quiet beauty found in petal and leaf. Our team of passionate botanists and designers craft living spaces that breathe.

What We Do

Services that transform spaces

Get a Consultation
01
Garden Design
Complete landscape transformation from concept to living masterpiece. We design for every scale, from intimate courtyards to grand private estates.
Learn More →
02
Floral Installations
Ephemeral art installations for weddings, events, and corporate spaces. Each arrangement is a unique composition existing perfectly for its moment.
Learn More →
03
Botanical Sourcing
Rare and exotic specimens ethically sourced from global nurseries. We procure species you won't find anywhere else, with full provenance documentation.
Learn More →
